missions.title: Atoms and Nuclei - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering Rutherford model, alpha scattering, Bohr postulates and more.

microtargets.title: Rutherford model
mustKnowFacts: Rutherford model is a fundamental subtopic of Atoms and Nuclei.
Crucial to understand the principles governing Rutherford model for NEET.
commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Rutherford model during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for Rutherford model.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify structures related to Rutherford model.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Rutherford model.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain the core concept behind Rutherford model.
What is a common trap associated with Rutherford model?
